issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases for animation usage.

scenarios.name: Build an animated tab underline indicator that slides between active tabs using motion/react
scenarios.rationale: Baseline imports from framer-motion and animates the underline imperatively via state, while treatment imports from motion/react and uses a single motion.div with the same layoutId="activeTab" rendered conditionally inside the active tab so the shared layout animation handles the slide with a spring transition as documented.

scenarios.name: Create a parallax hero where the heading translates upward and fades out as the user scrolls
scenarios.rationale: Baseline wires up a scroll event listener with useState, while treatment uses useScroll and useTransform(scrollY, [0, 500], [0, -150]) plus an opacity transform applied via motion.div style={{ y, opacity }} as documented.
